_comment: S8 Realistic Band Scene — a fixed, human-readable 12-station band profile spanning 450–2550 Hz. Unlike S1–S7, there are no 'parts': all 12 stations are rendered simultaneously in every trial, producing a slot that sounds and behaves like a real busy FT8 band. Run before the controlled scenarios as a qualitative cold-listening check and holistic decode-rate benchmark. Informational only — no PASS/FAIL gate.
name: Realistic Band Scene
description: Fixed 12-station band profile across 450–2550 Hz at realistic SNR spread (−15 to +3 dB). Includes a near-collision pair (E/F, 12 Hz apart) and a capture pair (G/H, co-frequency, 6 dB ratio). 5 trials vary only AWGN seed. Metric: holistic decode rate per appraiser (no gate).

signals._note: Near-collision with E: 12 Hz apart (< 2 tone bins)
Capture pair with G: co-frequency, 6 dB weaker
0.5 s late start — exercises time-offset separation
